diagnosis: The production operation failed due to insufficient OpenRouter credits. The requested max_tokens was 65536 but the available credit could only afford up to 47235 tokens. This is an external provider resource issue, not a repository defect.
message_to_web_gpt: OpenRouter credit insufficiency. Add credits or adjust the execution plan to use fewer max_tokens or a cheaper model. The top supervisor may be used to safely override the plan with a reduced token limit while preserving user intent.
